## Automated Tests Required

### INFRA-001 Scene-attach — Integration
**Test file path**: No new test file. Verification is manual Play-mode smoke.
**What to verify**:
- ComboRegistry MonoBehaviour attached to scene root, `_database` wired to ComboDatabase.asset
- ComboDiscoveryTracker MonoBehaviour attached, `_comboRegistry` wired to ComboRegistry
- DraftRunController `_comboRegistry` field wired to ComboRegistry
- In Play mode: draft 2 skills that form a combo → effect fires (validates Sprint 4 carried condition #1)
- In Play mode: discover combo, quit, relaunch → `ComboDiscoveryTracker.HasDiscovered` returns true (validates carried condition #3)
- In Play mode: Inferno combo spawns burn patch (validates carried condition #2 — AoE playtest)

**Edge cases**: What happens if ComboDatabase has null skillA/skillB entries? (E4-007 hasn't populated them yet — combos won't discover until wired. INFRA-001 verifies the *mechanism*, not full content.)

---

### E4-004 Archer Combo Effects (6) — Logic
**Test file path**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Combo/ArcherEffects/` — one test file per effect
**What to test** (per effect):

**PlagueVolleyComboEffect**
- OnTrigger with PiercingArrow → applies Poison to all pierced targets (not just first)
- OnTrigger with non-PiercingArrow → no Poison application
- Activate/Deactivate cycle: no double-subscribe
- Default tuning values match story spec

**HailstormComboEffect**
- `_freezeChance = 1.0` → always applies Freeze on Multishot hit
- `_freezeChance = 0.0` → never applies Freeze
- Freeze-immune enemy → no error, no Freeze applied (Edge Case 10)
- Non-Multishot skill → no proc attempt
- Default: `_freezeChance = 0.30f`

**ShadowStepComboEffect**
- Afterimage death → explosion damage = `Attack * _damageRatio` in `_explosionRadius`
- Afterimage expires without dying → no explosion
- Default: `_damageRatio = 0.50f`, `_explosionRadius = 2.0f`

**PredatorsMarkComboEffect** (Passive)
- Activate: CounterRoll damage bonus upgraded from 2x to `_enhancedMultiplier`
- Deactivate: bonus restored to base 2x
- At exactly threshold distance: combo bonus applies (>= not >, Edge Case 9)
- Default: `_enhancedMultiplier = 3.0f`

**RapidAssaultComboEffect**
- When Quickdraw active + Multishot used → Multishot cooldown reduced
- When Quickdraw not active → no modification
- Deactivate: all modifiers removed cleanly

**VenomousHailComboEffect**
- Multishot hit → all 3 arrows apply Poison (not just center)
- Non-Multishot skill → no Poison spread
- Activate/Deactivate: clean lifecycle

**Cross-effect rules (all 6):**
- Each effect's Activate/Deactivate can run twice without double-subscribe
- No heap allocation in OnTrigger (no lambdas, closures, or LINQ)
- Deactivate when never Activated → no exception

**Estimated test count**: ~24 unit tests (4 per effect)

---

### E4-005 Universal Combo Effects (7) — Logic *(Should Have)*
**Test file path**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Combo/UniversalEffects/` — one test file per effect
**What to test** (abbreviated):

| Effect | Key Assertions |
|--------|----------------|
| BerserkersFury | Kill streak of 5 → +10% move speed for 3s. Streak resets on damage. Buff stacks additively. |
| Ironclad | Below 30% HP → defense doubled. Above 30% → modifier removed. Threshold crossing both directions. |
| GoldRush | Kill proc at 10% → bonus currency 3x. Deterministic at 1.0/0.0. |
| **ElementalStorm** (CRITICAL) | Target with Burn+Freeze → 30% bonus damage. 5-hit cap per target (G-009). Reset when status drops. Dictionary cleanup in Deactivate. |
| VampiricStrikes | Burn-killed enemy → heal player 5% of enemy max HP. Non-burn kill → no heal. |
| GaleForce | Passive move speed + attack speed buff. Modifiers removed on Deactivate. |
| **Executioner** (CRITICAL) | Slowed enemy below 25% HP → instant kill. **Boss-immune via EnemyData.isBoss** (F-007, TR-combo-008). Boss at 1% HP + Slowed → NOT killed. |

**CRITICAL tests** (non-negotiable before merge):
- Executioner: `isBoss = true` + slowed + below threshold → NO kill (boss immunity)
- Executioner: `isBoss = false` + slowed + below threshold → instant kill
- Executioner: above threshold → no kill regardless
- ElementalStorm: hit count reaches 5 → bonus stops. Hit count at 4 → bonus still applies.
- ElementalStorm: only one status active → no bonus (both required)
- ElementalStorm: Deactivate clears `_hitCounts` dictionary completely

**Estimated test count**: ~28 unit tests (4 per effect)

---

### E3-006 Shield Phase Ability — Logic *(Should Have)*
**Test file path**: `Assets/Trizzle/Tests/Boss/ShieldPhaseAbilityTest.cs`
**What to test**:
- Activate with 4 hits → deal damage 4 times → shield breaks on 4th
- During shield: apply Freeze → boss IS frozen (status effects pass through)
- During shield: deal damage → boss HP unchanged (damage blocked)
- Hit counter scales: phase 0 = `_baseShieldHits` (4), phase 2 = 4 + (2 * 2) = 8
- Each hit = 1 count regardless of damage amount (100 damage = 1 hit, same as 1 damage)

**Estimated test count**: ~5 unit tests

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### E4-006 Combo Discovery UI — UI
**Verification method**: Screenshot + designer sign-off + manual walkthrough
**Who must sign off**: xiaolei (solo dev + design)
**Evidence to capture**: `production/qa/evidence/e4-006-combo-discovery-ui-evidence.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Combo name text appears centered on screen when `OnComboDiscovered` fires
- [ ] Text renders in Cinzel font (verify TMPro font asset, not fallback)
- [ ] Text color is gold (#FFD700 or project gold)
- [ ] Text center-aligned, slightly above screen center (not overlapping player)
- [ ] Fade-in ~0.1-0.2s; total display ~2.0s; smooth fade-out
- [ ] Distinct discovery SFX plays (not level-up or rarity SFX)
- [ ] Two sequential combos flash in order with ~0.5s gap (Edge Case 2)
- [ ] Flash does not block gameplay input
- [ ] Flash does not obscure health bar or skill cooldowns
- [ ] Flash fires every run, not just first-ever discovery
- [ ] `OnDisable()` unsubscribes — no double-subscribe after scene reload

**Suggested test flow**:
1. Load run with 2 skills forming a combo (e.g., Fireball + BurnAttack = Inferno)
2. Trigger combo via draft
3. Screenshot flash at peak visibility
4. Trigger second combo within 0.5s to test queuing
5. Complete run, start new run, re-trigger same combo — flash must appear again

### INFRA-001 Scene-attach — Integration (Manual Play-mode)
**Verification method**: Play-mode smoke check
**Evidence to capture**: noted in smoke-check report

Checklist:
- [ ] ComboRegistry visible in scene hierarchy with _database assigned
- [ ] ComboDiscoveryTracker visible with _comboRegistry assigned
- [ ] DraftRunController._comboRegistry field non-null in Inspector
- [ ] Draft 2 combo skills → effect fires (e.g., Fireball+BurnAttack → Inferno burn patch)
- [ ] Discover combo, quit app, relaunch → HasDiscovered returns true in debug
- [ ] No NullReferenceException in Console during combo discovery flow

### DD-001 Difficulty Curve Doc — Documentation
**Verification method**: Author review
**Evidence to capture**: `design/difficulty-curve.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Target death rate per wave (e.g., wave 5 = 20%, wave 10 = 50%)
- [ ] Target run length (median minutes to win)
- [ ] Win-rate bands per difficulty (Normal/Hard)
- [ ] One-paragraph rationale citing the GDD fun hypothesis

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off for Sprint 5:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. New game → Normal difficulty → first run starts and reaches wave 1
3. **New for Sprint 5**: ComboRegistry + ComboDiscoveryTracker scene-attached and functional (INFRA-001)
4. **New for Sprint 5**: Mage combo effects fire in Play mode (validates Sprint 4 code via live scene)
5. **New for Sprint 5**: Archer combo effects fire when Archer class is selected (E4-004)
6. **New for Sprint 5**: Combo discovery gold flash appears on-screen (E4-006)
7. **New for Sprint 5**: Discover combo, quit, relaunch → discovery persisted (Sprint 4 E4-008 live verification)
8. Existing combat tests (Mage, Archer, Boss, difficulty scaling) still pass — regression gate
9. Frame time during combo-active gameplay within 16.6 ms budget (no frame spikes)

Reference this list when running `/smoke-check sprint` before Sprint 5 QA hand-off.

| E4-006 | Does the combo-discovery flash read as "you found something new and powerful"? | 1 | Any |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/playtests/` and reviewed by xiaolei before the story can be marked COMPLETE.

## Entry / Exit Criteria

**Entry** (must be true before sprint implementation begins):
- [x] ADR-0003 status = `Accepted` (confirmed 2026-04-15, amended 2026-04-16)
- [x] Sprint 4 QA sign-off on disk (APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS — confirmed 2026-04-16)
- [x] Sprint 4 gate-check completed (FAIL — stay in Production, documented 2026-04-16)
- [ ] Archer skill SOs exist for E4-004 effect wiring (N1-006 skills from Sprint 3)

**Exit** (sprint QA cycle complete):
- [ ] All Must Have stories have passing unit tests (E4-004) or manual evidence (E4-006, INFRA-001)
- [ ] INFRA-001 verified: combos fire in Play mode + discovery persists
- [ ] `design/difficulty-curve.md` exists (DD-001)
- [ ] `production/qa/smoke-2026-04-XX.md` exists with verdict PASS
- [ ] `production/qa/qa-signoff-sprint-05-2026-04-XX.md` exists with APPROVED or APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS
- [ ] No S1 or S2 bugs

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 5

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all UI stories (E4-006 specifically)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced — existing 70+ tests from Sprints 1-4 still pass
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] `production/sprint-status.yaml` reflects story's status
